page_content:
Application Procedures and Forms

Applications are available online and are reviewed on a rolling basis each fall and spring semester. Students are asked to respond to three short-essay questions and share their plan for completing the program requirements. Students will be notiﬁed of their application status via email approximately 2-3 weeks after submitting their application.

After the closing application date, applications will be reviewed and applicants will be notiﬁed within two to three weeks by email.

Leadership Studies Minor 1
